title: OpenMercantil Company Event
description: A single BORME act associated with a Spanish company in the OpenMercantil registry timeline.

id.description: OpenMercantil-stable identifier for the BORME act.

date.description: Date the act was published in BORME.

type.description: BORME act category (e.g., Constitucion, Nombramientos, Ceses, Cuentas anuales, Disolucion).

source_url.description: Canonical BOE/BORME source URL when available.
